refnamediv.refpurpose: Executes a prepared SQL statement over an array of parameter sets

refentry.refsect1:
&reftitle.description;
intfalsedb2_execute_many resourcestmt arrayoptions[]
db2_execute_many executes an SQL statement that was prepared by db2_prepare once for each set of parameters in the options array, and returns the total number of affected rows.
db2_execute_many is not supported on IBM i (PASE).

&reftitle.parameters;
stmt
A prepared statement returned from db2_prepare.
options
An array of arrays of input parameters. The prepared statement is executed once for each element, binding that element's values to any parameter markers contained in the statement.

&reftitle.returnvalues;
Returns the number of affected rows, or &false; on failure.
